titles.text: Logic Mahjong Souryu: Yon-nin Uchi / San-nin Uchi
ロジック麻雀 創龍 四人打ち・三人打ち

descriptions.text: Here's a traditional mahjong game with no cheaters. In addition to the typical four-person rules, you can play a speedier game of three-player mahjong, with bigger chances of bigger hands. You can change various rules, and even experience an adventure-game-like story mode. There's even a hidden mode where you can play a match against characters from the "Marl Kingdom" series of games. Casual controls and traditional gameplay--this game is enjoyable for all ages.
